flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Long Island University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($24.6k → $28.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Long Island University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Long Island University rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (32.7% → 44.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Long Island University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (46.8% → 57.1%).
